# Model Card: FixtureCorp Lending Pre-Approval Assistant

_Synthetic test fixture — fictional system, no real client data._

## Overview

FixtureCorp Lending Pre-Approval Assistant is a classical machine
learning model that recommends a consumer credit pre-approval tier based
on applicant credit history and income data.

## Data Inputs

The model consumes applicant credit bureau history and self-reported
income data. No health, biometric, or children's data is processed.

## Users

Recommendations are shown to loan officers, who review and confirm every
recommendation before any pre-approval offer is issued to a consumer.

## Human Oversight

Section 5, "Human Oversight": a licensed lending officer confirms every
recommendation before issuance. A human oversight review committee meets
quarterly to audit a sample of decisions.

## Impact

A pre-approval recommendation affects a consumer's access to credit
products but does not itself deny credit — a declined pre-approval can
still proceed to full underwriting review. The business considers this a
high-impact system given its role in the lending funnel.
